perf.regime: per-token cos/sin-cache gather + rotate-half pointwise over BOTH the Hq query heads and the Hk key heads in one launch. Memory-bound (one cache read per token, broadcast over heads). Verified on GB10 (sm_121): verify 5/5, verify_parity agree. The multi-dim codegen (_TritonGenMultiDim/_launch_multidim) gives each Store its own coord decomposition + ``offs < numel_<out>`` mask so different-sized outputs (Hq != Hk) do not OOB (#104).
